_readme: Owner-editable news sources for the daily refresh (fetch-news.js).
general: RSS/Atom feeds shown to everyone — add/remove/reorder freely.
perTicker: feeds looked up for each held symbol (Yahoo first, Google
News as fallback, then plain text-matching of tickers in general
headlines). Set enabled:false to run general feeds only.
maxItems caps the rendered list. Edit on GitHub; the next scheduled
refresh (or a manual Data Refresh dispatch) picks it up.
